title: Inferno - Hardcore
description: Transforms Minecraft's hardcore mode into an unforgiving survival experience.
body:
![inferno_logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e000cc30c78ebb0c8e6a77662afe6edfc79b9c1e.png)
## Disclaimer:

This mod adds changes to vanilla to make it harder and is designed to be used with the Inferno modpack.

It will still work if you download it without the pack but for a better and cleaner experience, play with the modpack.

Modpack link: [Inferno - Better Hardcore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/inferno-hardcore-redefined)


**Full list of current features:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- You can't get one-shot from full hp (except fall damage).
  
- Thunderstorms are a little bit more intense. I would recommend crafting a lightning rod.
  
- Hostile mobs now spawn with random potion effects.
  
- Hostile mobs are modified.
  
- Every zombie that spawns will be a baby.
  
- Saturation is heavily nerfed.
  
- Hunger drains much faster.
  
- Starvation is more severe.
  
- Defeating the Wither is a necessary for going to the end (configurable).
  
- Every trade with a villager results in them being smited by lightning (configurable).
  
- Burning will persist until you enter water.
  
- Using a Totem of Undying will consume 2 maximum hearts and they won’t activate if you're already at half a maximum health (configurable).
  
- Weather conditions affect mob spawns.
  
- Most piglins are replaced with a piglin brutes.
</details>
